title: Freeze the Happy Ghasts
description: Freeze the Happy Ghasts so that they stay where you want them to be!
body:
![Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/FREEZE_THE_HAPPY_GHASTS/MP_FREEZE_THE_HAPPY_GHASTS_Header.webp) Freeze the Happy Ghasts is a simple but super useful mod that lets you freeze Happy Ghasts in place using a special wand. Just right-click them and they’ll stay exactly where you left them. Perfect for building or organizing without them floating away like in vanilla Minecraft. The wand can be traded from the Wandering Trader for emeralds! ### Do you need a server to play with your friends?

For exceptional server hosting services, look no further than **[BisectHosting](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)**. Of course, you can install all the mods or modpacks you want, and their support team is always available to help you. **[With the code "Lupin" you will get a 25% discount! Click here!](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)** ![Summary](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/FREEZE_THE_HAPPY_GHASTS/MP_FREEZE_THE_HAPPY_GHASTS_Description.webp) With a new wand, you can freeze any Happy Ghasts in place just by clicking on them, so they won’t wander off while you’re busy building or crafting. Need them to move again? Just use the wand one more time to unfreeze them. The best part? This wand isn’t just handed to you, you’ll need to get it through the Wandering Trader, finally giving that mob a bit more purpose. The mod currently works with Minecraft 1.21.7, and support for 1.20.1 and 1.21.1 is coming very soon, making it compatible with other mods that add the Happy Ghasts in those versions. ![FAQ](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/FREEZE_THE_HAPPY_GHASTS/MP_FREEZE_THE_HAPPY_GHASTS_Faq.webp) ### How can I get the wand to freeze ghasts? ### This wand can be obtained by trading with the Wandering Trader, and has a cost that varies between 8 and 16 emeralds. There is no other way to get it. ### Does it work on servers? ### Sure! Remember that the best way to play with mods and friends is with BisectHosting, and by **[clicking on this link you can get a 25% discount](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin).** ### Can this mod be used in modpacks? ### Of course! As long as it is published only on Modrinth or CurseForge. Uploading it to any other platform would be violating our rights and is not allowed at all. However, we are really grateful if you consider adding it to your Modrinth or CurseForge modpack. If you need any small changes or have any questions, contact us! ![Screenshots](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/FREEZE_THE_HAPPY_GHASTS/MP_FREEZE_THE_HAPPY_GHASTS_Screenshots.webp) ![Screenshots 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9Ae5gWms/images/dc2211a7c5d4bb9a8fa21013e4e56df73eb42f46.jpeg) ![Screenshots 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9Ae5gWms/images/9fb0015c5b13cb75fb61342e2142bab7e46a14d1.jpeg) ![Screenshots 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9Ae5gWms/images/55351afa7c46791c34220d7697b6191ad1afe360.jpeg) [![DISCORD](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MultiRecipe/BH_Lupin_Discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/X8VY5WMbe4) .
